# protonpass_items (Data Source)

Lists all items in a Proton Pass vault.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "protonpass_items" "all" {
  share_id = protonpass_vault.example.share_id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `share_id` (String) Share ID of the vault to list items from.

### Read-Only

- `items` (Attributes List) List of items in the vault. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--items))

<a id="nestedatt--items"></a>
### Nested Schema for `items`

Read-Only:

- `create_time` (String) Creation timestamp.
- `item_id` (String) Unique identifier of the item.
- `modify_time` (String) Last modification timestamp.
- `share_id` (String) Share ID of the vault.
- `title` (String) Title of the item.
